name: @galerinaa/core-compiler
description: Galerina compiler pipeline contracts for parsing, checking, IR, diagnostics and reports.

scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run build && node --test tests/*.test.mjs tests/bootstrap-determinism/*.test.mjs tests/governance-conformance/*.test.mjs tests/parser/*.test.mjs tests/package-resolver/*.test.mjs tests/value-state/*.test.mjs tests/type-registry/*.test.mjs tests/effect-checker/*.test.mjs tests/governance/*.test.mjs tests/stdlib/*.test.mjs tests/lexer/*.test.mjs
